title: Epic: SummitFlow Platform Extraction
description:
Extract dev tooling from portfolio-ai into standalone SummitFlow platform.

**Goal:** Reduce portfolio-ai by ~30%, create reusable dev platform.

**Plan:** ~/.claude/plans/sparkling-meandering-cascade.md

**Phases:**
1. Foundation (repo scaffold, core schema, project registration) - DONE
2. Sitemap extraction (first vertical slice) - DONE
3. Features/Evidence/Vision extraction (main value) - IN PROGRESS
4. Files + remaining tools extraction
5. Commands integration

**Deferred to v1.1:** Auto Mode, AI Reviews, OAuth terminal, Agent Hub

**Migrated from:** portfolio-ai-43g

title: Cross-project Celery task explorer
description:
Hierarchical task viewer for all registered projects.

**Features:**
- Tree view showing task dependencies (parent > children)
- Expandable task groups (by schedule, by type, by status)
- Details panel showing:
  - Task: schedule, last run, duration, dependencies, logs
  - Group: task count, success rate, next scheduled
- Visual dependency tree (what blocks what)
- Filter by status, schedule type, recent failures
- Cross-project view (see tasks from portfolio-ai, summitflow, etc.)

**Reference:** Reverted commit 6bff7e1 in portfolio-ai (portfolio-ai-0hl)

**Why SummitFlow:** This is dev tooling for understanding task architecture across projects, not operational monitoring.

title: Sitemap UI polish
description:
Create /sitemap page and polish UI to match SummitFlow design aesthetic.

**Current state:**
- Sidebar links to /sitemap (404)
- SitemapTab component exists and works at /projects/[id]
- alert() calls need toast replacement

**Work:**
1. Create /app/sitemap/page.tsx as standalone sitemap view (cross-project or project selector)
2. Replace alert() calls with proper toast notifications
3. Use frontend-design skill for design consistency
4. Ensure matches phosphor-green/dark theme

**Migrated from:** portfolio-ai-gil

title: Agent Hub: Centralized AI orchestration
description:
Centralized AI orchestration hub for SummitFlow.

**Features (from portfolio-ai Agent Hub):**
- Multi-agent chat interface (Claude, Gemini)
- Context injection from current page/feature
- Evidence capture integration
- Browser automation for testing
- Pre-populated prompts based on context

**Why SummitFlow:** Agent Hub is dev tooling - helps developers interact with AI for debugging, testing, and exploration. Not user-facing functionality.

**Status:** DEFERRED to v1.1
**Blocked:** Requires planning session to define cross-project architecture

title: Review beads docs against official documentation
description:
Review and update SummitFlow's beads documentation against official beads docs.

**PRIMARY SOURCES:**
- https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/blob/main/docs/QUICKSTART.md
- https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/blob/main/README.md
- https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/blob/main/docs/AGENT_MAIL.md
- https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/blob/main/docs/DAEMON.md

**FILES TO REVIEW:**
- .claude/docs/bead-reference.md
- .claude/rules/issue-tracking.md
- .claude/rules/bead-quality.md
- CLAUDE.md
- AGENTS.md

**CHECKLIST:**
1. Verify all bd commands are documented correctly
2. Check for new features in official docs
3. Add any missing dependency commands (bd dep tree, bd dep cycles)
4. Document bd ready, bd blocked patterns
5. Review hierarchy notation (project-id.N.N)
6. Check bd stats, bd info commands
